comment: Set profile to "medsec-strict" for hospital-adjacent / MedSec posture: all TX, GPIO-out, contact, and system actuators denied. Passive RX allowed with edu-ack. NOT a medical device. Deploy with: scripts/deploy_medsec_packs.ps1 -MedsecStrict

medsec-strict.note: Switch to default only for Faraday dual-control lab TX under written RoE.
